name: Dark Era
short_description: A Game set in post-apocalyptic world where an alien virus has taken over, kill the infected ones ,Survive their attacks , clear the levels to complete the game. There are currently two game modes one is level based and another is Arcade mode.
detailed_description: A Game set in post-apocalyptic world where an alien virus has taken over,  kill the infected ones ,Survive their attacks , clear the levels to complete the game. There are currently two game modes one is level based find the keys cross the levels. Another is Arcade mode it's round based kill infected ones to complete the rounds. Arcade mode has three different maps.
